[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 110000111 5
2 110111100 6
3 000101110 4
4 011010000 3
5 101011101 6
6 100000010 2
7 110101000 4
